settings.title: Settings — Treasora Academy
settings.heading: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Changes apply to the website and Dominar immediately.

dashboard.title: Dashboard — Treasora Academy
dashboard.lead: Here's where you left off, and what Dominar has built for you so far.
dashboard.leadUpgraded: Welcome to Pro — your subscription is active. Dominar is unlimited.
dashboard.noWeakAreas: No weak areas yet — keep learning!
dashboard.dominarStripTitle: Have a question about anything so far?
dashboard.dominarStripBody: Dominar remembers your progress and goals — ask away.

passport.title: Financial Passport — Treasora Academy
passport.lead: Tell Dominar your goals, experience, and learning style so your education feels personal from the first lesson.
passport.dominarIntro1: Think of me as your financial best friend, mentor, and lifelong learning companion.
passport.dominarIntro2: I'm here to help you understand money, build wealth, and achieve the financial future you want.
passport.portfolioHelp: What topics matter most to you? ETFs, dividend stocks, index funds, crypto, real estate…
passport.portfolioPlaceholder: Example: ETFs, dividend investing, long-term index funds
passport.favoritePlaceholder: Example: VTI, AAPL, Bitcoin — anything you're curious about
passport.biggestGoal: What is your biggest financial goal?
passport.goalHelp: You can write or speak to Dominar. Tell me anything about your goals, dreams, or what you'd like to learn. Or pick one to start:
passport.goalPlaceholder: Example: I want to become financially free, retire early, learn investing, build passive income, help my family, or simply understand how money works.
passport.fillAllFields: Please fill in every required field above so Dominar can build your path.
passport.previewError: This site isn't connected to a real backend yet — your Passport can't be saved in this preview.
passport.sessionExpired: Please sign in first — your session may have expired.
passport.saveError: Something went wrong saving your Passport: {{message}}
passport.memoryGoalsBody: Dominar remembers what you want to achieve and why it matters.
passport.memoryProgressBody: Dominar tracks completed lessons, strengths, and areas needing review.
passport.memoryRoadmapBody: Dominar creates a personalized roadmap that evolves as your goals and knowledge grow.
passport.memoryPersonalityBody: Dominar adapts to how you learn, your risk tolerance, and your financial habits.
passport.ctaBody: Your Financial Passport is saved. Dominar will use it to personalize every lesson and conversation.
passport.ctaNote: Both start from the same account — nothing is lost either way.

learn.title: Learn — Treasora Academy
learn.heading: Foundation Program
learn.lead: 20 beginner-friendly lessons — from money basics to your first investment decisions.
learn.upgradeTitle: Finished the Foundation, or already know your way around?
learn.upgradeBody: Pro unlocks advanced lessons, a personalized roadmap, the Portfolio Simulator, and unlimited Dominar — no need to finish all 20 first if you're ready now.

joinPro.title: Join Pro — Treasora Academy
joinPro.heroLead: Pro turns Dominar from a helpful guide into a full personal financial mentor — one that remembers everything and builds your path forward.
joinPro.monthlyNote: Billed monthly. Cancel anytime — no contracts.
joinPro.annualNote: One payment per year. Same Pro features, better price.
joinPro.checkoutError: Couldn't start checkout — please try again.
joinPro.welcomePro: Welcome to Pro! Your subscription is active.
joinPro.checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled — no charge was made.
joinPro.backHome: Not ready yet, back to Home
joinPro.signInHint: Already have an account? Sign in to upgrade.

askDominar.title: Ask Dominar — Treasora Academy
askDominar.quotaFree: Free plan: {{left}} of {{limit}} questions left today
askDominar.emptyBody: Ask me anything about money, investing, or your goals. You can type, talk, or attach a document or screenshot for me to look at.
askDominar.composerNote: Dominar can make mistakes. For big decisions, confirm with a licensed advisor.
askDominar.listening: ● Listening… tap the mic again to stop
askDominar.limitReached: You've used today's free questions. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited conversations with Dominar, or come back tomorrow.
askDominar.notConfigured: Dominar isn't connected to a real backend yet — this preview is just the interface. Once Supabase keys are added, I'll respond for real.
askDominar.signInRequired: You'll need to sign in before Dominar can respond and remember your progress.
askDominar.errorGeneric: Dominar is having trouble responding right now. Please try again.
askDominar.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach Dominar — check your connection and try again.
askDominar.voiceUnsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser yet. Try Chrome, or type your question instead.
